leadText: Shadow Storm (Japanese: ダークストーム Dark Storm) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Storm deals damage to both opponents. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Storm cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura is used to whip up a vicious tornado.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Storm has the same power , accuracy , and targeting as Surf in Pokémon XD (the only game this move appears in).
